insight: AdvancedBan cancels AsyncPlayerChatEvent at HIGHEST priority, but ChatControl's channel system sends messages inside its own handler at a lower priority — so priority changes alone can't fix it. The fix is a direct API hook via PunishmentManager.get().isMuted(dashlessUuid) in HookManager.isMuted(). AdvancedBan uses dashless UUID strings (no hyphens).
